CONGRATULATIONS Jamari Anthony Jacquet

Monarch Knight, Class of 2026. Graduate, dreamer, and future software developer. The tassel turned — long live the code.

Future Ahead
Once a Knight, always a Knight

Forged at Monarch High

Home of the Knights since 2003 in Coconut Creek, Florida — where every classroom carries the Knights' Code of Chivalry. Jamari didn't just earn a diploma here. He earned his colors: black, red & silver.

KnightsMascot
2003Established
Coconut CreekBroward County, FL
2026His Class
The Moment

From the stage at Monarch
to whatever comes next.

Jamari walked across that stage in Fort Lauderdale and closed one of the proudest chapters a family can witness. Cap. Gown. Diploma in hand. Class of 2026.

But anyone who knows him knows this isn't a finish line — it's a launch. He's got a builder's mind and his eyes are already on the next thing: writing code, shipping ideas, and turning the ordinary into the extraordinary.

Where he's headed →
Why it matters

Three things this diploma proves

🧭

He finished what he started

Thirteen years, every early morning, every late assignment — done. That kind of follow-through is the whole game.

💡

He thinks like a builder

Jamari doesn't just use technology — he's curious about how it works and how to make it himself. That's the developer mindset.

🚀

He's just getting started

A diploma is a key, not a destination. The most exciting code he'll ever write hasn't been written yet.

The Knights' Code of Chivalry

The code he lived by becomes the code he writes

Every Monarch classroom holds the Knights' Code. The same values that made him a Knight are the ones that make a great developer.

🛡️

Honor → Integrity

A knight's word is his bond. A developer's commit history is theirs. Build things you'd put your name on.

⚔️

Discipline → Craft

Chivalry is showing up and doing the hard thing well, every time. So is shipping clean, working code.

👑

Service → Impact

Knights protect and serve. The best software serves people — solving real problems for real lives.

The Next Chapter

Cap & gown today.
Code tomorrow.

He told the family he's into programming. So we ran the numbers.

jamari@future ~ %
